name: Windows 10 Accessibility Settings - CU Denver
snippet:
Settings > Ease of Access > High Contrast · Adjust the Turn on high contrast toggle · Choose a Theme · Select from the drop-down menu.
Change pointer size and color · Adjust the pointer size slider · Click "Apply" to save changes.
